procedures.name: CT-guided percutaneous liver biopsy
procedures.facility: University of Maryland Medical Center — IR Suite
procedures.notes: Outpatient biopsy scheduled after the planned anticoagulation hold. CANCELLED on arrival — the patient presented to the appointment with recurrent dyspnea and pleuritic chest pain and was sent to the ED, where progressed bilateral PE was found. Biopsy deferred pending stabilization and a revised anticoagulation/timing plan.
